title: I Will Take Heed and Guard My Ways

verses.text: “Lord make me know the end of all my days; Teach me the measure of my fleeting life. You made my days a meager handbreath long; My lifetime is as nothing in your sight.
“Surely mankind stands as a fleeting breath! “Surely a shadow, man walks to and fro! Surely for naught he toils to gather wealth. Who will inherit? He will never know.”
“And now, O Lord, what am I waiting for? I put my hope and trust in you alone. Save me from all my wickedness and sin. O make me not the scorn of foolish men.
